creator: einar@isnic.is
text:
(In reply to Muhammad Moinur Rahman from comment #3)

Thank you, I'll keep these in mind in the future.

I checked 1.2.0 and it didn't have the tests either. I've openend an issue with upstream, to ask that tests/ is included in the pypi archive. If they're against it, would it be preferable to fetch the archive from github rather than pypi? Or just live without tests?
